changelog: New: Exercise images and videos now show in the active workout screen — expanded exercise card displays the media thumbnail.
New: Download button shows a spinner during save and a checkmark on success.
Fixed: Sync banner no longer has a blur background backdrop.
Fixed: Toast notifications redesigned — centered, rounded, cleaner appearance.
Fixed: Exercise picker now stores image and video references so media works everywhere.
Fixed: Optimized exercise database lookups (faster workout logging).
